tools.name: get_schedule
tools.description: Read the user's calendar via connected provider.

tools.name: add_to_calendar
tools.description: Add an event via connected provider.

tools.name: get_vitana_index
tools.description: Return the user's current Vitana Index.

tools.name: get_index_improvement_suggestions
tools.description: Suggest concrete actions to lift the Index.

tools.name: save_diary_entry
tools.description: Save a diary entry from voice.

tools.name: record_journey_answer
tools.description: Record a Journey Foundation answer (goal, economy stance, focus, teaching ack); writes the real record and returns the next guided move.

tools.name: delete_reminder
tools.description: Delete one or all reminders (after confirm).

tools.description: View matches on a specific intent, or omit intent_id to aggregate all the user's matches and open the My Matches screen.

tools.name: get_matchmaker_result
tools.description: Poll for matchmaker agent's polished result.

tools.name: recall_conversation_at_time
tools.description: Recall a past conversation by time reference.

tools.name: report_to_specialist
tools.description: Hand off to a specialist persona (Devon/Sage/Atlas/Mira).

tools.name: set_capability_preference
tools.description: Choose default provider for a capability.

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Read email via connected Gmail account.

tools.name: consult_external_ai
tools.description: Delegate a question to a connected external AI.

tools.name: create_index_improvement_plan
tools.description: Schedule a calendar plan to lift a pillar.

tools.name: ask_pillar_agent
tools.description: Ask a pillar-specific agent a question.

tools.name: resolve_recipient
tools.description: Map a name to a community member user_id.

tools.name: send_chat_message
tools.description: Send a DM to another member.

tools.name: share_link
tools.description: Share a deep link with another member.

tools.name: share_intent_post
tools.description: Share an intent post with someone.

tools.name: scan_existing_matches
tools.description: Scan for new matches on existing intents.

tools.name: navigate_to_screen
tools.description: Navigate to a canonical app screen.

tools.name: log_exercise
tools.description: Log an exercise session (minutes + activity type).

tools.name: get_pillar_subscores
tools.description: Break down a pillar score into baseline/completions/data/streak.

tools.name: get_top_in_pillar
tools.description: Top scorer in a single pillar.

tools.name: ask_who_is
tools.description: NL router for free-form 'who is...?' questions.

tools.name: list_diary_entries
tools.description: List the user's diary entries in a date window.

tools.name: recall_memory_about
tools.description: Topic search across memory items with category filter.

tools.name: get_memory_garden_summary
tools.description: Counts per memory category — for 'what do you remember about me?'.

tools.name: forget_memory
tools.description: Soft-delete a single memory item by id (after confirm).

tools.name: reschedule_event
tools.description: Move a calendar event to a new time.

tools.name: find_free_slot
tools.description: Find next available slot for a duration.

tools.name: get_event_details
tools.description: Read full details of a single event.

tools.name: check_calendar_conflicts
tools.description: Find events overlapping a proposed window.

tools.name: snooze_reminder
tools.description: Push a reminder out by N minutes.

tools.name: list_missed_reminders
tools.description: List reminders that fired but weren't acked.

tools.name: join_group
tools.description: Join an existing group by id.

tools.name: invite_to_group
tools.description: Invite a member to a group.

tools.name: global_search
tools.description: Unified search across people / posts / products / events.

tools.name: list_upcoming_meetups
tools.description: List upcoming meetups near the user.

tools.name: explain_recommendation
tools.description: Get a natural-language reason for a recommendation.

tools.name: dispute_match
tools.description: Open a dispute on a match.

tools.name: set_alarm
tools.description: Set a wake-up alarm at HH:MM.

tools.name: get_world_time
tools.description: Current local time in a city or IANA timezone.

tools.name: find_perfect_product
tools.description: Flagship deep search — fuses pillar deficits, Life Compass goal, and multi-criteria filters into top-3 product picks with rationale.

tools.name: find_perfect_practitioner
tools.description: Flagship practitioner / coach / doctor search with multi-criteria filtering.

tools.name: find_perfect_match
tools.description: Flagship people-match search (workout partner, accountability buddy, mentor).

tools.description: Recent VTIDs from the ledger; filter by status.

tools.description: Lookup a single VTID by id.

tools.description: Pending approval count — for 'how many PRs are waiting?'.

tools.description: Recent ORB voice sessions for Voice Lab.

tools.name: dev_get_autonomy_pulse
tools.description: Autonomy loop metrics (in-flight VTIDs, terminalized, healing runs).

tools.description: READ-ONLY wallet snapshot: balance per currency, active subscription,

tools.description: UPDATE simple own-profile fields: display_name, bio, city, country, location.

tools.description: PLAY an internal Vitana Media Hub podcast by title or topic. Returns an

tools.name: like_post

tools.name: create_community_post
tools.description: Compose and publish a post to the user's community feed on their behalf.

tools.name: get_life_compass
tools.description: Return the user's active Life Compass — the one-sentence long-term direction they set in Settings.

tools.name: list_followers
tools.description: Read who follows the user: count, names, mutual-follow count.

tools.name: list_following

tools.name: narrate_guided_session
tools.description: Speak the authored script of the user's next Guided Journey onboarding session.

tools.name: recent_conversations

tools.description: Find a match by searching the community catalog, then recommend existing matches or post the request.

tools.name: get_what_vitana_knows
tools.description: "What do you know about me" summary

tools.name: add_diary_photo
tools.description: Attach photo to diary (navigates to picker)

tools.name: admin_kb_baseline_optout
tools.description: Opt out of a baseline doc

tools.name: dev_publish_to_prod
tools.description: The PUBLISH button by voice (double confirm + reason)

tools.name: dev_run_simulator
tools.description: Dry-run conversation decision for a user

tools.name: dev_system_briefing
tools.description: Composite morning briefing: health + deploys + approvals + violations + failing checks

tools.name: start_marketplace_discover_assistant
tools.description: Start a guided shopping conversation for a product, service, practitioner or diagnostic need; records the goal and returns the first clarifying step

tools.name: build_personalized_shopping_guide
tools.description: Convert a broad need into a concise recommendation path across products and services, grounded in the shopping agent

tools.name: refine_marketplace_recommendations
tools.description: Update the current picks from conversational feedback (cheaper, no pills, at home, different brand)

tools.name: explain_marketplace_recommendation
tools.description: The concise what-it-is / what-for / why-for-you / limits explanation of a current pick

tools.name: complete_marketplace_selection
tools.description: Confirm the selected option and route it to the basket (two-step confirm; never charges)

tools.name: capture_shopping_goal
tools.description: Record what the user wants to achieve, solve, explore or purchase in the active guide

tools.name: clarify_shopping_need
tools.description: Return the smallest set of missing criteria (budget, format, urgency, exclusions) still needed

tools.name: classify_marketplace_intent
tools.description: Determine whether the need maps to a product, service, diagnostic test, practitioner or combination

tools.name: extract_purchase_criteria
tools.description: Extract budget, location, urgency, format, priorities, exclusions and desired outcome from natural language

tools.name: save_marketplace_preferences
tools.description: Save reusable shopping preferences (dietary, values, exclusions, budget) with user permission

tools.name: get_marketplace_preferences
tools.description: Retrieve saved shopping preferences relevant to the current request

tools.name: reset_marketplace_preferences
tools.description: Remove saved marketplace preferences after confirmation

tools.name: exclude_marketplace_brand_or_category
tools.description: Persistently exclude a brand or category from future recommendations

tools.name: get_marketplace_context
tools.description: Return the minimum relevant user context (saved preferences, budget, recent orders) for the current request

tools.name: explain_personalization_basis
tools.description: Explain in plain language which stored information shaped a recommendation

tools.name: dismiss_marketplace_recommendation
tools.description: Dismiss a recommended product or service so it is not proposed again

tools.name: show_sponsored_status
tools.description: State whether an item is sponsored, promoted or commission-bearing

tools.name: explain_no_suitable_option
tools.description: Explain honestly when no appropriate marketplace option was found

tools.name: discover_marketplace_options
tools.description: Unified search across products AND services for one stated need

tools.name: search_products_by_need
tools.description: Search products by purpose and outcome rather than exact product name

tools.name: search_services_by_need
tools.description: Search services (wellness, nutrition, therapy, labs) by desired outcome

tools.name: search_marketplace_by_values
tools.description: Filter products by dietary tags, certifications and value preferences

tools.name: search_marketplace_alternatives
tools.description: Find alternatives to a product the user dislikes or cannot use

tools.name: search_marketplace_by_budget
tools.description: Find options within a defined total budget across categories

tools.name: search_local_services
tools.description: Search services available near the user

tools.name: search_marketplace_by_availability
tools.description: Search by delivery date or appointment availability

tools.name: generate_top_marketplace_picks
tools.description: Return a small number of best-fit options with short per-pick rationales (never stages the cart silently)

tools.name: recommend_marketplace_path
tools.description: Recommend whether to start with a product, service, diagnostic or combination for the stated goal

tools.name: rerank_marketplace_options
tools.description: Re-rank current options when the user changes a priority

tools.name: recommend_lower_cost_option
tools.description: Find a suitable less expensive alternative to a current pick

tools.name: recommend_premium_option
tools.description: Find a higher-quality or more comprehensive alternative

tools.name: recommend_non_product_alternative
tools.description: Suggest a service or non-purchase approach when a product is not the best fit

tools.name: recommend_complete_solution
tools.description: Build a product-and-service combination that addresses one broader goal

tools.name: explain_why_recommended
tools.description: Explain why the assistant selected this option for this user, from the recorded rationale

tools.name: summarize_product_for_user
tools.description: Personalized short summary: what it is, what for, why it may fit, key limits — never the full spec

tools.name: get_key_product_facts
tools.description: Only the most important facts: price, form, usage, availability, safety notes

tools.name: explain_how_to_use_product
tools.description: Practical use instructions (dosage, serving) without overwhelming detail

tools.name: explain_relevant_limitations
tools.description: Surface only the limitations relevant to this user

tools.name: explain_evidence_summary
tools.description: Concise description of evidence strength and uncertainty for a product or service claim

tools.name: compare_marketplace_options
tools.description: Compare up to three options on the criteria that matter to this user

tools.name: highlight_meaningful_differences
tools.description: Explain only the differences likely to affect the user's choice

tools.name: identify_best_value_option
tools.description: Determine the strongest value for the user's needs, not just the lowest price

tools.name: answer_product_question
tools.description: Answer one focused question about one product

tools.name: shortlist_marketplace_options
tools.description: Save products to the user's shortlist for later comparison

tools.name: remove_from_marketplace_shortlist
tools.description: Remove an option from the shortlist

tools.name: browse_diagnostic_tests
tools.description: Browse diagnostic services by type: blood, metabolomics, microbiome, genomics, hormones, longevity panels

tools.name: find_test_by_health_goal
tools.description: Find diagnostic categories matching a stated goal without diagnosing

tools.name: find_test_by_biomarker
tools.description: Search tests containing a named biomarker

tools.name: get_test_details
tools.description: Biomarker list, sample method, preparation and result timeline for one test

tools.name: check_home_collection_availability
tools.description: Check whether home sample collection is available for a test

tools.name: order_home_test_kit
tools.description: Stage an eligible home test kit into the basket after confirmation

tools.name: book_lab_appointment
tools.description: Book a laboratory or sample-collection appointment

tools.name: get_ordered_test_status
tools.description: Track kit shipment, sample receipt, processing and result readiness

tools.name: prepare_for_diagnostic_service
tools.description: Concise preparation checklist (fasting, timing, medication questions for a professional)

tools.name: recommend_diagnostic_test
tools.description: Recommend suitable diagnostic categories for a stated information need, never a diagnosis

tools.name: find_practitioner_by_specialty
tools.description: Find practitioners by specialty, goal and user preferences

tools.name: compare_practitioners_for_user
tools.description: Compare a practitioner shortlist on the user's priorities

tools.name: book_practitioner_appointment
tools.description: Book an available appointment after confirmation

tools.name: build_marketplace_solution_plan
tools.description: Concise multi-step product and service plan for one goal

tools.name: create_diagnostic_and_consultation_bundle
tools.description: Pair a diagnostic service with suitable result interpretation

tools.name: check_bundle_compatibility
tools.description: Check whether bundle components logically work together, without duplication

tools.name: add_bundle_to_cart
tools.description: Stage all purchasable bundle items into the basket after confirmation

tools.name: save_marketplace_plan
tools.description: Save a marketplace plan to resume later

tools.name: check_product_suitability
tools.description: Check one product against saved preferences, exclusions and dietary needs

tools.name: check_dietary_compatibility
tools.description: Check vegan, vegetarian, gluten-free or other dietary requirements for a product

tools.name: check_cart_duplication
tools.description: Detect repeated or overlapping products in the basket

tools.name: check_delivery_restrictions
tools.description: Check country and shipping limitations for a product

tools.name: check_test_overlap
tools.description: Identify duplicated biomarkers across diagnostic packages

tools.name: check_service_prerequisites
tools.description: Identify referrals, preparation or eligibility requirements for a service

tools.name: compare_marketplace_prices
tools.description: Compare prices of equivalent options including reference prices

tools.name: explain_price_difference
tools.description: Explain why two similar options are priced differently

tools.name: review_shopping_budget
tools.description: Read the monthly shopping budget, current spend and remaining headroom

tools.name: estimate_total_ownership_cost
tools.description: Show recurring or long-term cost rather than only the initial price

tools.name: confirm_marketplace_selection
tools.description: Read back the exact selected option (name, price, key terms) and obtain explicit confirmation before any cart action

tools.name: add_selected_option_to_cart
tools.description: Stage the confirmed option into the universal basket (never charges; screen handoff for payment)

tools.name: add_shortlist_item_to_cart
tools.description: Stage an item from the shortlist into the basket after confirmation

tools.name: review_cart_suitability
tools.description: Check duplicates and conflicts with saved preferences before checkout

tools.name: explain_cart_item
tools.description: Explain why a specific basket item is there (origin, rationale)

tools.name: confirm_cart_total
tools.description: Read back total price and any recurring charges before the screen handoff

tools.name: get_next_order_action
tools.description: Tell the user the next required step for an order (delivery, sample, appointment)

tools.name: submit_marketplace_review
tools.description: Record the user's rating of a purchased product or service after confirmation

tools.name: start_return_request
tools.description: Start a return process for an eligible order

tools.name: cancel_marketplace_order
tools.description: Cancel an eligible order after confirmation

tools.name: report_marketplace_issue
tools.description: Report an order, product or service problem
